title: narcissus hispanicus subsp. provincialis
intro: Narcissus hispanicus subsp. provincialis, also known as Narcissus pseudonarcissus var. pseudonarcissus, is a subspecies of the Narcissus hispanicus, a type of daffodil that is native to southern Europe and western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus hispanicus subsp. provincialis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing a sore throat. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the bulbs and using them in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
